meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on 'no project ideas.' Learn how to use Claude Code skills and Antigravity to automate SaaS validation and ship your MVP at record speed.
content.answer_block: Overcome 'no project ideas' by leveraging Claude Code to perform automated market analysis and rapid prototyping. By integrating Antigravity, you transform abstract pain points into validated SaaS features. This workflow allows you to move from a blank screen to a functional, revenue-ready MVP in under four hours of focused development.
content.intro:
The silent killer of startups isn't a bad idea—it's the absence of one. You stare at a blank IDE, waiting for a spark that never comes, while your competitors are already iterating on their second version. This paralysis is a symptom of a broken validation process, not a lack of creativity.

Today, we shift from passive ideation to aggressive execution. By leveraging Claude Code's autonomous reasoning and Antigravity's rapid scaffolding, we turn the 'blank page problem' into a systematic, repeatable machine for generating high-value SaaS features that users actually want to buy.

steps.title: Automated Market Gap Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scrape and analyze high-traffic forums for recurring user complaints, identifying immediate opportunities for micro-SaaS solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current trends in [Niche] using search data. Identify 3 specific pain points where users are complaining about existing software limitations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Search for recent discussions in [Niche] and extract top 3 recurring feature requests. Output as a JSON schema for a SaaS MVP.'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Generate a production-ready boilerplate based on the identified market gap to bypass initial setup friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust Next.js boilerplate with Supabase integration and Stripe checkout for the identified [Pain Point] solution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Initialize project structure using Antigravity patterns for [Pain Point]'

steps.title: Core Logic Implementation
steps.description: Feed the market data back into Claude Code to build the specific logic that solves the user's biggest headache.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic service that automates [Pain Point] using the previously identified user requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Implement the core logic service based on the requirements defined in step 1.'

steps.title: Autonomous Unit Testing
steps.description: Ensure the MVP is stable by forcing Claude Code to write and run tests against your core logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive Jest test suites for all new modules created. Ensure 90% coverage for critical payment and data paths.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /test 'Run all tests and fix any regressions found in the new logic.'

steps.title: Deployment and Feedback Loop
steps.description: Deploy to a staging environment for immediate user feedback, keeping the build-measure-learn cycle tight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the project for Vercel deployment. Add a feedback collection modal linked to a Google Sheet.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /deploy 'Configure deployment pipeline and add telemetry for user interaction tracking.'

pro_tips: Treat your Claude Code prompts as 'micro-specs'—if the prompt is vague, the code will be unusable. Always define the input/output types first.
Use Antigravity to enforce strict architecture boundaries; avoid letting AI 'spaghetti code' sprawl across your project files.
Always run a 'Security Audit' command after Claude generates complex auth logic to catch potential vulnerabilities before deployment.
Focus on shipping a 'Concierge MVP'—use AI to generate the interface, but handle the complex 'AI-heavy' backend tasks manually until you hit $1k MRR.
Cache your most effective prompt patterns in a local 'prompts.json' file so Claude can reference your unique architectural style for every new feature.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, direct your first 10 users to the feedback link generated in Step 5. Analyze their responses to determine if you should pivot or double down on features.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the one that pays. We provide the tools, the prompts, and the community of builders scaling to 6-figures. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
